(AC1O) Has Irregular Bowel Movement Pattern CHAR 1 Customary routine: ADL patterns - has irregular bowel movement pattern. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
111 AC1P AC1P_SHOWERS (AC1P) Showers for Bathing CHAR 1 Customary routine: ADL patterns - showers for bathing. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
112 AC1Q AC1Q_BATH_PM (AC1Q) Bathing in PM CHAR 1 Customary routine: ADL patterns - bathing in PM. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
113 AC1R AC1R_NONE_ABOVE (AC1R) None
